OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Fetches personal information of the logged in community user
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: FetchPersonalInformation

omniProcessElements.name: GetUserPersonAccountId
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "userId" : "=%userId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSExpCloudGetUserPersonAccountId1", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction2", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: GetUserPersonalDetails
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "userId" : "=%userId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSExpGetLoggedInUserPersonalInfo1", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction3", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }
